creator: larry.price@cpmicro.com
text:
The latest version is 6.2.9-6 and the 9-3 version is no longer available from any of the source sites. I noticed that this port was just updated a couple of weeks ago and it's already out of date.

The 6.2.9-6 source from imagemagick.org compiles and runs with no problems observed (so far).

How-To-Repeat: Attempt to 'make install' the port.
